meaning: n.<美>牛栏,<口>大房间(尤指候审犯人用的),[棒球]候补队员区
examples: The team's bullpen is solid this year.
He didn't trust many people, most of all his bullpen.
This can be tricky even in a simple bullpen setting, and far more difficult as the team is staffed globally.
Cespedes homered into the visiting bullpen in left for a 4-1 lead in the fifth.
"The problem, like today, is that we've used our bullpen a lot, " Mattingly said.
